meta.subject: Pavel Rapoport
meta.note: Education (Mehina, AL-Beef, courses) and personal events are tracked separately and intentionally excluded from this dataset.

periods.organization: Abandoned Observatory of the Pioneer Palace
periods.summary: Basic on ДВК. Coded Arkanoid. Second place, math olympiad.
Full service during the Second Intifada.
Gaming club, ~20 PCs. Organized tournaments: Counter-Strike, Warcraft, Red Alert. Expanded into PC assembly and retail (Asus specialization).
notable: First business. First real entry into the IT industry.

periods.summary: Owned the full website for an Asus/ZALMAN distributor. Fiber connection to the warehouse servers — the site resolved stock availability in real time. Reseller order flow, email campaigns, database, servers, domain. Arrived via LANFUN clients.
Full frontend for babytv.com. Multi-language CMS, 40+ modules. Fox International Channels (News Corp) had just acquired BabyTV in November 2007.
Frontend for BbjLinen.com and GoForex.co.il. Flash design center and a 3D-rendered event-table configurator.
Bidsarena.com — reverse online auction e-commerce platform. Database, REST/HTTP APIs, frontend, CMS.
Frontend for a Microsoft-ecosystem security and endpoint protection product. One of the first Israeli startups to scale heavily on Microsoft Azure.
HTML5 Video Player and company site. Built an animation platform on CreateJS. Animated scenes in HTML5 Canvas.
SVG-based ETL pipeline visual editor — core product feature, drag-and-drop node graph. Led the migration from Backbone.js to Angular. Managed the frontend team.

Built the entire design system from scratch in under a year — shipped two weeks before product release, serving Web App, CRM, and landing portals. One of the first engineers. Company later acquired by Check Point.

Theme manager and brand-tooling product — a shared visual language between designers and developers. Designed the infrastructure and REST API. Managed a team of 4. Scope was too broad; the product did not take off.

Pivot from brand DNA around one concrete client case (work-hours calculation). Hiring platform for blue-collar workers — real-time matching, scheduling, payments. Raised investor interest — COVID-19 ended fundraising and the company.

Incremental migration from AngularJS 1.5 to React for the enterprise Disaster Recovery Management Console. Created @zerto/shared-fe: 56+ components, Atomic Design, dual-format npm package consumed by 4 product apps. AG Grid Enterprise integration, Redux Toolkit + TanStack Query hybrid state, D3.js visualizations.
notable: Monorepo: 38,490 commits across 215 contributors and 5 sub-projects.

periods.summary: Lead contributor on the Zerto micro-application for HPE GreenLake Storage Console. Architected the cross-origin ShellAPI bridge. Drove the design-system migration from MUI to HPE's Tailwind-based standards. RBAC, Keycloak SSO, FIPS-compliant Nginx, Kubernetes deployment. Transitioned the team to documentation-first, AI-assisted delivery (2024 onward).
Relocation Israel → Moldova. IT Park Moldova registration in progress. Full independent work begins.
